name: AdpConnector
description: Connects to the ADP Marketplace REST APIs (Workers/HCM, Payroll, Time, Benefits, Talent) using OAuth 2.0 client-credentials over mutual TLS (mTLS). Supports list_workers / get_worker / list_payments / get_payment_outputs / list_time_cards / list_benefits / list_jobs plus pay distributions, time-off requests, business communications and org units.

install_fields.label: ADP Client ID
install_fields.help: OAuth2 Client ID from ADP Marketplace → My Apps → your app credentials.

install_fields.label: ADP Client Secret
install_fields.help: OAuth2 Client Secret. Found alongside the Client ID in ADP Marketplace.

install_fields.label: SSL Client Certificate (PEM)
install_fields.help: Inline PEM cert chain ADP issued when you registered the consumer application. mTLS is mandatory — every TLS handshake (including the token mint) must present this certificate.

install_fields.label: SSL Client Private Key (PEM)
install_fields.help: Inline PEM private key paired with the certificate above. Stored encrypted; written to a tmp file at install time so httpx can load it through `cert=(crt, key)`.

install_fields.label: ADP API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the ADP REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Token URL
install_fields.help: ADP OAuth 2.0 token endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum ADP API requests per minute. Default is 60 — the standard ADP marketplace quota.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id, client_secret, client_cert and client_key; projects the inline PEM material to a tmp file; marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Authenticate (Client Credentials over mTLS)
apis.description: Mints a fresh OAuth 2.0 access token using the client-credentials grant. The TLS handshake presents the ADP-issued client cert/key.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies ADP API connectivity by listing one worker via GET /hr/v2/workers?$top=1.

apis.name: List Workers
apis.description: GET /hr/v2/workers — paged worker roster with optional OData $filter / $select.

apis.name: Get Worker
apis.description: GET /hr/v2/workers/{aoid} — fetch a single worker by associate OID.

apis.name: List Employees
apis.description: GET /hr/v2/employees — paged employee roster with optional OData $filter.

apis.name: List Payments (Pay Statements)
apis.description: GET /payroll/v1/workers/{aoid}/pay-statements — list pay statements with OData $top / $filter.

apis.name: Get Payment Outputs
apis.description: GET /payroll/v1/workers/{aoid}/pay-statements/{id} — fetch a single pay statement.

apis.name: List Time Off Requests
apis.description: GET /time-off/v2/workers/{aoid}/time-off-requests — list pending and historical TOR.

apis.name: Submit Time Off Request
apis.description: POST /time-off/v2/workers/{aoid}/time-off-requests — file a new TOR via the ADP Events envelope.

apis.name: List Benefits Enrollments
apis.description: GET /benefits/v1/workers/{aoid}/enrollments — list a worker's benefit enrollments.

apis.name: List Business Communications
apis.description: GET /hr/v2/workers/{aoid}/business-communications — list a worker's emails / phones.

apis.name: Update Personal Communications
apis.description: POST /events/hr/v1/worker.business-communication.email.change — update a worker's email/phone via the Events API.
